{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Lake
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A wide, sapphire-bright lake is located south of the [[pyramid]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
